channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: On the curb in between the two Addison Court buildings, 6th June
item.description:
Noticed on Friday evening that a substantial amount of trash had been left on the pavement. Thank you for helping keep the street clean!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Flag attached to lamppost, 6th June
item.description:
Flag attached to lamppost by The Blackheath Tea Hut. Council maintained

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goffers Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th June
item.description:
Repeat dumping of waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drummond Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Lots of rubbish in the middle of the woods where kids et cetera hang out. Broken pans and glass, et cetera.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree very close to house, 6th June
item.description:
Please can the tree adjacent to my house in Shaftesbury road be trimmed. The branches are growing into/against the property. Tree is in Croydon Rec, I live at the end of Shaftesbury road next to the park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shaftesbury Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 171 /169, 6th June
item.description:
Exposed drainage waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walm Lane, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th June
item.description:
Fly tipping frequency here is once every two weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drummond Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to Wates building by the electrical (?) building near the entrance to the parking lot to the left of Wates, 6th June
item.description:
There is a large amount of garbage that someone left, including some furniture. I just noticed this morning, but this is a common spot for fly tipping. Thank you very much, this is very appreciated !!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Fly-tip, 6th June
item.description:
Rubbish bags dumped at junction of Swithland Gardens and William Barefoot Drive

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): William Barefoot Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle Hangar Door Lock Broken, 6th June
item.description:
Hi, As I was walking by the cycle hangar I use, I saw it was wide open. I tried to close it with the key I have however I realised as I did so that the reason it wasn’t locked and the door wide open was that the lock seemed broken. Please could you fix it?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged bollard, 6th June
item.description:
Damaged bollard on traffic island outside 175 White Horse Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): White Horse Hill, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped chair by electrical sub station, 6th June
item.description:
Dumped chair by electrical sub station
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garrick Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 6th June
item.description:
Graffiti on sign on public footpath (running from Kemnal Road to vineyard at Home Farm) What3words location ///bucks.spit.juices

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence next to bus stop is damaged and broken, 6th June
item.description:
The fence next to the bus stop is damaged and broken. People keep climbing through it and therefore going to the toilet on the verge when they’re waiting for the bus which is disgusting people stand at the bus stop just kicking the fence even further now it has started to be broken. It needs to be fixed amended to stop people using it to cut through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gully outside 110 Charlton Park lane, 6th June
item.description:
Regularly. Blocked
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canberra Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two shopping trolleys, 6th June
item.description:
Either side of park entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewisham Park, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Someone dumped their rubbish after moving from their flat. I kindly ask the council to remove the rubbish. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in same Area, 6th June
item.description:
Flytipping is same area as always. The property manager has cameras setup here. Is it possible to work with them to identify the offenders?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobden Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 6th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaking water main, 6th June
item.description:
Main water leaking and has been for over 4 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Osidge Lane, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
